## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss product demo logistics and gather insights for content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/sDdyPXCcmbNz3zRygy7fS7jRdKe4rBA6?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [David (new hire from Stripe) to prepare/record product demo addressing key questions](https://fathom.video/share/sDdyPXCcmbNz3zRygy7fS7jRdKe4rBA6?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [GrowthX team developing content strategy (SEO, white paper, thought leadership)](https://fathom.video/share/sDdyPXCcmbNz3zRygy7fS7jRdKe4rBA6?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Metronome's edge: mature usage-based billing vs. Stripe's nascent offering](https://fathom.video/share/sDdyPXCcmbNz3zRygy7fS7jRdKe4rBA6?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Demo & Q\&A will inform content creation, competitor analysis, feature highlights](https://fathom.video/share/sDdyPXCcmbNz3zRygy7fS7jRdKe4rBA6?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)

## Topics

### Product Demo Planning

  - [David joining demo prep; recording use case-specific demos (e.g., threshold billing)](https://fathom.video/share/sDdyPXCcmbNz3zRygy7fS7jRdKe4rBA6?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Agreed to broader demo covering Metronome's data model + addressing provided questions](https://fathom.video/share/sDdyPXCcmbNz3zRygy7fS7jRdKe4rBA6?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [GrowthX open to async demo recording if easier for Metronome team](https://fathom.video/share/sDdyPXCcmbNz3zRygy7fS7jRdKe4rBA6?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)

### Content Strategy Insights

  - [GrowthX developing multi-pronged approach:](https://fathom.video/share/sDdyPXCcmbNz3zRygy7fS7jRdKe4rBA6?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
    1.  SEO strategy
    2.  White paper analysis/repurposing
    3.  Top-of-funnel thought leadership
  - [Demo info to enhance content research, SEO strategy, competitor analysis pages](https://fathom.video/share/sDdyPXCcmbNz3zRygy7fS7jRdKe4rBA6?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)

### Metronome vs. Competitors

  - [Key differentiator: mature usage-based billing product](https://fathom.video/share/sDdyPXCcmbNz3zRygy7fS7jRdKe4rBA6?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Stripe's usage-based billing described as "early stages", less robust](https://fathom.video/share/sDdyPXCcmbNz3zRygy7fS7jRdKe4rBA6?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [GrowthX plans "wall of content" vs. Orb (frequently posting competitor)](https://fathom.video/share/sDdyPXCcmbNz3zRygy7fS7jRdKe4rBA6?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)

### Internal Document Sharing

  - [White paper shared with GrowthX \~2 days ago (in zip file with other docs)](https://fathom.video/share/sDdyPXCcmbNz3zRygy7fS7jRdKe4rBA6?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [David unaware of sharing; confirms it's close to final version](https://fathom.video/share/sDdyPXCcmbNz3zRygy7fS7jRdKe4rBA6?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)

### David's Background

  - [Experience creating product demos at Stripe](https://fathom.video/share/sDdyPXCcmbNz3zRygy7fS7jRdKe4rBA6?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
